authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(30) — Coon Creek (San Luis Obispo Co.)
sources.quotedText: (30) Coon Creek (San Luis Obispo Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 255490, "Coon Creek", Stream, CA, San Luis Obispo Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":255490,"gaz_name":"Coon Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"San Luis Obispo","objectid_1":1037079,"isunknowncoords":2}, first point / mouth (Web Mercator -13458022.3401, 4199116.3222 → 35.2589°N, 120.8955°W), near the creek's outlet at the Pacific Ocean in Montaña de Oro State Park. Corrects prior file coordinates (-120.8870, 35.2570), which were about 800 m inland/east of the GNIS mouth point and match the Coon Creek Trailhead parking-lot coordinate (35.257927, -120.886988) rather than a GNIS pull.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Coon Creek (San Luis Obispo Co.) is closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
